name: llama-diffusion
description: DiffusionGemma 26B-A4B (text diffusion LLM) served locally with an OpenAI-compatible API.

install_flow.step1_ask_user: BEFORE installing, ASK the user two things: (a) which quantization to download — present the 'models.variants' list and the VRAM each needs; (b) the maximum context tokens (default 32768). Do not assume defaults silently.
install_flow.step4_serve: pwsh scripts/serve.ps1 -BindHost 0.0.0.0   (or, as admin, pwsh scripts/install_service.ps1)
install_flow.step5_configure_self: Register the OpenAI provider in your own config (see 'configure').

models.note: VRAM = model size + ~2 GB compute buffer + KV-cache (grows with context). Smaller context => less VRAM.

api.wsl_host_hint: From WSL, {HOST_IP} is the 'vEthernet (WSL)' adapter IP on the Windows host (e.g. 172.18.160.1).

hermes.action: Add a provider of type 'custom' (OpenAI-compatible) with base_url set to the LAN endpoint and a model 'diffusiongemma-26b-a4b-it' with context_length matching the chosen value.
hermes.from_wsl: Use the Windows host vEthernet (WSL) IP for base_url (e.g. http://172.18.160.1:8787/v1).

openclaw.action: Register an OpenAI-compatible model/provider pointing at base_url with model id 'diffusiongemma-26b-a4b-it'.
